things.name: West Lake (Xihu)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage scenic lake with ancient pagodas, causeways and pavilions

things.name: Longjing Tea Plantations
things.description: Visit the dragon well tea gardens producing China's most prestigious green tea

things.name: Lingyin Temple (Temple of the Soul's Retreat)
things.description: One of China's largest Buddhist temples with magnificent stone carvings

things.name: Song Dynasty Town (Songcheng)
things.description: Living museum of the prosperous Song Dynasty era with elaborate performances

things.name: Leifeng Pagoda
things.description: Reconstructed Song Dynasty pagoda on the lakeshore with city views

things.name: National Tea Museum
things.description: Chinese tea culture from prehistoric times through the Song Dynasty tea ceremony

things.name: China Silk Museum
things.description: World's largest silk museum tracing 5,000 years of Chinese silk production

things.name: Evening West Lake Illuminations
things.description: Night boat on the lake passing illuminated bridges and pavilions

things.name: He Fang Street
things.description: Qing-dynasty pedestrian street with tea houses, food stalls and traditional shops

things.name: Dongpo Pork (Dongpo Rou)
things.description: Braised pork belly created by poet Su Dongpo - Hangzhou's signature dish
